name: Basic Chicken Salad
directions: Place almonds in a frying pan.
Toast over medium-high heat, shaking frequently.
In a medium bowl, mix together mayonnaise, lemon juice and pepper.
Toss with chicken, almonds and celery.

name: Marinated Shrimp
directions: Combine all ingredients except shrimp in large bowl.
Add shrimp and toss to coat.
Cover and refrigerate 4 to 6 hours or overnight.
Transfer shrimp mixture to serving bowl and serve with toothpicks.

name: Salad Supreme
directions: Toss vegetables with remaining ingredients; coat well.
Refrigerate several hours.
Mix well before serving.

name: Fancy Vegetable Medley
directions: Saute onion in butter until transparent.
Add carrots and saute 5 minutes before adding broccoli stem pieces.
Saute 2 minutes more.
Add the florets,basil,garlic powder,salt and pepper and bouilon powder.
Cover and let simmer in its own juices for 3to5 minutes.

similar.name: My Version of Lipton's Dry Onion Soup Mix

name: Throw Up Dip
directions: Brown meat in saucepan.
Drain fat.
Mix in cream cheese and let melt.
Add salsa and let simmer, stirring frequently.
Dish into a bowl and enjoy with Doritos!

name: Curry Dip
directions: Thoroughly mix all ingredients together.
Chill.
Serve with an assortment of fresh, raw veggies: broccoli, carrots, cauliflower, celery, cucumber strips (seeds removed), green& red bell peppers, mushrooms, spring (green) onions or squash.

name: Fish Marinade
directions: Combine all ingredients& stir well.
Marinade fish for 1/2 hour to an hour before grilling.

name: Taste-Tingling Dry Meat Rub
directions: Mix all dry ingredients together.
Rub on meats or fish to season.
Roast or grill as desired.

name: Seasoned Salt Mix
directions: Mix everything together in a bowl, store in an airtight container.
Good in burgers, on grilled meats and vegetables.

name: BLT Dip
directions: Place bacon in a large, deep skillet.
Cook over medium high heat until evenly brown.
Drain on paper towels.
In a medium bowl, combine mayonnaise and sour cream.
Crumble bacon into the sour cream and mayonnaise mixture. Garnish with Green Onions.
Mix in tomatoes just before serving.
Serve with Chips.
*You could use the pre-cooked bacon and microwave it for a couple of minutes to make it even easier.

name: Judi's Seasoning Salt
directions: Mix together and keep in sealed jar.
Makes 1/3 cup.

name: Creamy Horseradish Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients, in a small bowl.
Good to serve right away, but gets better as it sits a while.

name: Classic Italian Chicken Salad
directions: Toss salad greens with chicken breast strips, tomatoes and onions in a large salad bowl.
Add dressing and mix lightly.
Top with cheese.
Serve immediately.
Enjoy!

name: Cucumber and Herb Dip
directions: Mix all ingredient well; cover and chill for several hours.
12 Servings.

name: Double Dill Dip
directions: Combine first 8 ingredients in blender.
Blend smooth.
Turn into bowl.

name: Linda's Chip & Veggie Dip
directions: Blend all ingredients together; my sister-in-law uses her food processor.
Serve with veggies or chips.

name: Shrimp Cocktail Dip
directions: In small bowl, combine all ingredients.
Cover; refrigerate several hours or overnight to blend flavors.
Serve with crackers.

name: Spicy Cod Greenport
directions: Sprinkle bread crumbs on bottom of a greased, shallow baking dish.
Place cod on top of crumbs.
Combine remaining ingredients and pour over fish.
Bake uncovered in 450* oven@ 10 minute per inch thickness of fish, basting several times.
Garnish with fresh parsley if desired.

name: Chipped Beef Bread Dip
directions: Put dried beef through food processor or finely chopped (food processor is best,dont forget to rinse well).
Add all ingredients into a mixer& mix well.
Serve onced chilled with bread, bread bowls are great for this dip.

name: Dry Rub for Ribs
directions: Grind all ingredients until pulverized.  Store airtight.

similar.name: Cayenne-And-Cumin Barbecue Rub for Ribs or Brisket

name: Salad With Tarragon Vinaigrette
directions: Rinse and spin-dry lettuce, set aside.
In large bowl, mix remaining ingredients.  Add lettuce on top and place in refrigerator.
Toss well before serving and top with croutons and/or cheese sprinkles, if desired.
A few tips: You may want to add more or less salt, depending on how much lettuce you are using.
You can also use 1/4 chopped onion in place of the shallots - shallots have a milder, sweeter taste that truly compliments the dressing but vidalia or purple onion would be a good substitute.
You can also add radishes, chopped kale, and raw spinach greens to the lettuce before tossing.

similar.name: Simply Elegant Salad With Balsamic Raspberry Vinaigrette

name: Dill Dip for Veggies
directions: Mix all well and chill OVERNIGHT to let flavors mingle.
Serve with sliced veggies - anything in your garden!

name: Mama's Clam Dip
directions: Put clams and sour cream into a mixing bowl.
Add garlic powder,worcestershire sauce,lemon juice and tobasco sauce.
Salt and pepper to taste.
Stir until all ingredients are blended well.

name: Irene's Wilted Coleslaw
directions: Place green cabbage and onions through the processor.  Place the cabbage and onion mixture in a mixing bowl.  Sprinkle 1/2 cup sugar on top.  Let stand.
In a small saucepan, heat oil, sugar, vinegar, salt on medium heat until boiling.
Pour mixture over cabbage mixture and mix well.
Sprinkle celery seed over mixture and mix well.
Refrigerate until ready to use.

name: Dry Onion Soup
directions: Add all ingredients to jar with tight lid and shake well.
To use add 1/4 cup mix to 4 cups water.
Can also add to recipes in place of onion soup packet, 1/4 cup = 1 envelope.
Enjoy.

similar.name: My Version of Lipton's Dry Onion Soup Mix
Crock Pot Chicken and Wild Rice Soup

name: Portabella Burger Marinade
directions: Combine ingredients.
Place a small amount in a glass bowl.
Put mushroom in marinade cap side down.
Pour marinade on the stem side of the mushroom.
Marinade no longer than 5-10 minutes or mushroom will absorb too much of the marinade.
Grill, charcoal until mushroom is heated through.
Serve.

name: Dragon Salt
directions: Combine all ingredients. Store in an airtight container.

name: Spinach Salad Dressing
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and blend well.
Keeps refrigerated for weeks.

name: Incredible Dill Dip
directions: In a medium sized bowl combine all ingredients and stir well.
Chill for at least 2 hours before serving to allow flavors to develope.

name: Simple Steak Rub
directions: Mix all ingredients.
Store in an airtight container for up to 2 weeks.
Rub on meat as desired.

name: Groovy Green Goddess Dip
directions: In a food processor, combine first 6 ingredients.
Turn processor on and stream in olive oil.
Transfer dip to a bowl and stir in sour cream and black pepper to taste.
Serve with veggies of choice and breadsticks for dipping.

name: Worcestershire Aioli Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl and whisk well together. Adjust amounts of worcestershire and honey to taste.
Chill until ready to serve.
Use for dipping with fresh vegies.

name: Different Chili Cheese Dip
directions: Place the cream cheese in a microwave safe dish. I used a bowl.
Top with chili.
Place shredded cheese on next.
Microwave for 45 seconds to 1 minute.
Serve with Ritz crackers, chips, etc.

name: Honey Lime Berries & Greens
directions: In a medium bowl combine all salad ingredients and toss.
In a small bowl blend all dressing ingredients and mix well.
Serve salad with dressing.

similar.name: Baby Greens, Pear, Walnut and Blue Cheese Salad

name: That Good Salad
directions: In a jar with tight-fitting lid, combine oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt and pepper; cover and shake well.  Chill.
In a bowl, toss romaine, tomatoes, Swiss cheese, almonds if desired, Parmesan cheese and bacon.
Shake dressing; pour over salad and toss.
Add croutons and serve immediately.

name: Bacon Ranch Dip
directions: Mix all the ingredients in a bowl.
Serve with raw vegetables or chips.

name: Quick and Easy Taco Dip
directions: Place cream cheese into a bowl. If it isn't at room temperature you can microwave for about 20 seconds to warm it up.
Dump salsa on top of cream cheese.
Mix with hand mixer until well blended.
This thickens up nicely once refrigerted.

name: Shrimp and Cheese Dip
directions: Chop all ingredients together until smooth.

name: Lavender Marinade for Chicken or Fish
directions: Strip all flowers from the stems. Place in a bowl and add the orange zest, garlic, honey and salt, to taste. Combine well.  Add the olive oil and herbs and mix.

Spread mixture over chosen meat.  If the fish or chicken is very thick, make regular slashes and massage marinade into these.  Leave to marinate for minimum of 20 minutes before grilling (broiling) or baking, as desired.

name: Bacon-Flavored Dip Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl; blend well.
Spoon mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil and fold to make airtight.
Lable as Bacon-Flavored Dip Mix.
Store in a cool, dry place and use within 6 months.
Bacon Flavored Dip:
Combine 1 cup of sour cream and 1 package of mix.
Chill at least 1 hour before serving.
Makes about 1 cup of dip.
VARIATIONS:
Substitute 1 cup yogurt, 1 cup cottage cheese or 1 (8 oz) package of softened cream cheese for sour cream.

name: Janice's Shrimp Spread
directions: In a large bowl, beat all ingredients except milk until well combined. Add 1-2 tblsp milk depending on the consistency you like. I only add 1 tablespoon.
Chill overnight.
Serve with assorted crackers.

name: Wonderful Shrimp Salad
directions: Mix all ingredients together.  Chill 1 hour before serving.

name: Tam O' Shanter Coleslaw
directions: Lightly toss together, the first 4 ingredients.
Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
Pour salad dressing over and toss to coat.
Chill thoroughly.

name: Barbara's Ultimate 7 Layer Mexican Dip
directions: Layer each ingedient on top of one another in a 9.5 inch casserole dish.
Start by taking the cream cheese and spreading it along the whole bottom of your dish to create a layer(soften to room temperature for easy spreading).
Next spread the layer of refried beans.
Then spread your guacamole.
Then spread your salsa (trying not to mix layers).
Sprinkle the cheese over the top of it all.
Place chopped tomatoes and olives a top the layers and cheese.
Enjoy!

name: Baby Spinach Pesto
directions: Puree all ingredients in a food processor.
Enjoy with hot pasta, salads or as a spread for sandwiches.

name: Chip Dip
directions: mix all ingredients together
serve with chips.

name: Soy Marinade
directions: In large shallow dish or plastic bag, combine all ingredients.
add beef, pork or chicken.
marinade in refrigerator 4 hours or overnight turning occasionally.
remove meat from marinade.
grill or broil as desired, basting frequently with additional lemon juice.

name: Em 's  Rotel Dip
directions: Drain corn.
Drain tomatoes.
Finely chop onion.
Mix together all ingredients.

name: Parmesan Yogurt Dip
directions: In a bowl, combine all ingredients.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Serve with assorted vegetables.

name: Beaumonde Dip
directions: Mix together and let the flavors blend in the refrigerator for a few hours before serving.
Serve with fresh veggies.

name: Ww Bread Bowl and Dip
directions: In a medium bowl, combine soup mix, sour cream, mayonnaise and lemon juice.
Stir in spinach, carrots and water chestnuts; chill.
To serve, hallow out a the loaf of bread, by cutting a circle in the center of it.
Cut up remaining bread into 1-inch cubes.
Fill with dip.
Yields about 1/4 cup of dip and 2 bread cubes per serving.

name: Best Garlic Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients in a medium sized bowl.
You might want to add salt and pepper, but usually it doesn't need it.
Can be eaten straight away, but the flavours develop much better if you cover and chill it overnight.
Enjoy with crackers, crusty bread or with grilled meats.

name: Three Ingredient Salad Dressing to Die For
directions: Mix well and serve.

name: Spinach Dip Ala Wendy
directions: Just mix ingredients above and enjoy!

name: Easy Creamy Mustard Pretzel Dip
directions: Mix all 3 ingredients.
Let chill for  at least 30 minute
Enjoy!

name: Onion Soup Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients together well, and store up to 6 months in cool, dry place.
Stir before each use.
Five tablespoons of the mix equals 1.25-oz. pkg. of purchased dry onion soup mix.

similar.name: My Version of Lipton's Dry Onion Soup Mix

name: Honey-Wine Marinade
directions: Melt butter over medium heat.
Remove from heat and stir in remaining ingredients.

name: Rosemary-Citrus Marinade
directions: In a bowl, combine ingredients.

similar.name: Lavender Marinade for Chicken or Fish

name: Chili Powder Blend
directions: Mix all of the above ingredients together. Store in an airtight jar.
Use in any recipe that calls for chili powder.  This keeps well.

name: Linda's Spicy Taco Dip Delight
directions: Unwrap the cream cheese, place in plastic or glass bowl, and put in the microwave for 45 secs. to soften.
Add 1/2 packet of taco seasoning mix, and mix well.
Layer mixture on bottom of glass 9x13" pan.
Next, spread the refried beans over the cream cheese.
In a separate bowl mix the Ro-tel tomatoes and the salsa. Add this for the next layer.
Add the diced black olives for the next layer, then top with the cheese. Chill.
Serve with tortilla chips or scoops.

name: Caesar-Style Dressing
directions: Using a food processor or whisk, blend together all the ingredients.
Chill before using and serve within 1 day of preparation.

similar.name: Three Ingredient Salad Dressing to Die For

name: BBQ Lovers Steak Rub
directions: combine ingredients, and rub over surface of steak (sirloin or NY strip is the best).
Grill over medium heat.

name: Packerland Vegetable Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together and refrigerate for at least 8 hours.  Serve cold with chips, veggies, and pretzels.

name: Wow - Marinade for Grilling Anything
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Add meat of choice. (especially good w/pork).
marinate 6 hours to overnight.

name: Baby Greens, Pear, Walnut and Blue Cheese Salad
directions: Whisk first 4 ingredients in small bowl to blend.  Gradually whisk in oil.  Season dressing to taste with salt and pepper.
Toss greens in large bowl with enough dressing to coat.
Divide greens among 6 plates.
Top with pear slices, dividing equally.
Sprinkle with cheese and walnuts.
Drizzle lightly with remaining dressing and serve.

name: Artichoke and Basil Dip
directions: Process everything till smooth - you can leave it a bit chunky if you prefer.
Serve with pita bread.

name: Homemade " French" Dressing (Rachael Ray)
directions: Combine lettuce and chopped veggies in salad bowl.  (Use whatever "salad greens" you prefer.).
Add all of the dressing ingredients into a blender. Put the top in place and blend on high until dressing is combined.
Pour dressing over salad and toss. Adjust salt and pepper, to your taste.

similar.name: Three Ingredient Salad Dressing to Die For

name: Marinated Cheese
directions: Whisk together first three ingredients until mixture is blended.  Stir in red peppers and next 6 ingredients.  Set aside.
Slice cheese into 1/4" bite size pieces.  Arrange in a 9x13 dish.  Pour marinade over cheese.
Cover and chill at least 8 hours.
Transfer to a platter (placing cream cheese on top) and spoon marinade over top.  Serve with a variety of crackers.
Note:  You can use any type of cheese you like.  I have used Havarti, white cheddar, and mozarella.
Enjoy!

name: Balsamic Garlic Marinade
directions: Blend ingredients.

Marinate meat or firm-fleshed fish (salmon, tuna, shark, shrimp, etc) for up to 4 hours at room temperature (8 in fridge), preferably in a vessel that allows them to be completely covered. If not, turn halfway through your anticipated marinating time.
Discard marinade, then grill, broil or pan fry.

name: Linda's Dill Dip for Vegetables
directions: Blend all ingredients together.
Chill before serving.

name: Black Olive Dip
directions: Mix half can of olives and whole package of cream cheese.
Add cajun salt by 1/4 tsp to taste.
Add garlic powder by 1/4 tsp one time, taste, add more if needed for taste.
Garnish with paprika and parsley flakes.
*Add more cream cheese and olives if spices are too strong.

name: Jalapeno-Lime Marinade
directions: Mix all ingredients together; stir well.
To marinate- put meat to be marinated in a large zip-loc bag.
Pour marinade over meat and press to make sure all meat is covered.

name: Spicy Bayou Rub
directions: Mix all ingredients.
The end :-P.

name: Mediterranean Rub
directions: Mix together ingredients (make sure you crush the fennel and mustard well).

name: Barbecue Fish Marinade
directions: Whisk together all ingredients.
Marinate fish for at least 1 hour before cooking.

name: Ranch Dressing
directions: Mix all ingredients together.  You may need to add a little milk to thin out dressing to desired consistency.

name: Easy Baked Potato Soup
directions: Boil potatoes and onion until tender.
Drain potatoes and onion, reserving 1 cup of the water.
In a saucepan, combine the potatoes, onion, water and cheese soup.
Heat until thoroughly warmed.
Divide in 2 or 3 bowls and garnish with bacon crumbles, green onion, and shredded cheese.

name: Dried Beef Spread ("bagel Dip")
directions: Cut dried beef into small pieces.
Mix dried beef, sour cream, soup mix and mayo together with spoon.
Refrigerate (over night is recommended).
Serve with mini-bagels, crackers, or torn French bread pieces.

name: Smoked Spanish Paprika Barbecue Rub
directions: Mix together in a bottle or jar with a shaker top.
Spray meat with olive oil spray.
Sprinkle the rub generously over the meat.
Cook and eat. You'll be licking your fingers.

similar.name: Cayenne-And-Cumin Barbecue Rub for Ribs or Brisket

name: Dipping Sauce for Onion Patties/Petals and Blooming Onions
directions: Mix together and enjoy!
all measurements are approximately i just pour and tweak it depending on my mood! have fun with it!

name: Dijon Tarragon Salad Dressing
directions: Place all ingredients in a jar.  Cover and shake well.
Pour over salad just before serving.

similar.name: Three Ingredient Salad Dressing to Die For

name: Cottage Cheese Salad
directions: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients.
Serve immediately.

name: Antipasto Caesar Salad
directions: Pour dressing into large salad bowl.
Add romaine; toss until coated with dressing.
Add pepperoni, olives and artichoke hearts.
Sprinkle with croutons, cheese and pepper; toss.

similar.name: Simply Elegant Salad With Balsamic Raspberry Vinaigrette

name: Linda's Marinated Shrimp
directions: Mix sauce with electric mixer about 5 minutes before pouring over shrimp.
Shell and devein shrimp.  Cook shrimp in water until they just turn pink, 1-2 minutes.  Don’t overcook.
Put cooked shrimp, raw onion slices, and Bay leaves in a container.
Pour sauce over all.  Fold gently to incorporate the sauce evenly.
Cover the container, and let it remain in the refrigerator at least 24 hours.  (It is not necessary, but I do stir them once or twice in the 24-hour period.  It is an excuse to sample one).
Before serving, drain the sauce. Put drained shrimp in serving dish.
Sprinkle with parsley flakes, if desired.
Serve with crackers.

name: Caribbean Cobb Salad
directions: Arrange lettuce on a serving plate.
Spoon the shrimp down center of plate.  Arrange pineapple, avocado, bell pepper and macadamia nuts in rows on either side of shrimp.
Sprinkle with green onion.
Serve with dressing.

name: Cheesy Salsa
directions: Combine cheese, avocado, tomato, chiles, onions, olives and cilantro in large bowl.
Add salad dressing; stir to coat.
Season to taste with salt and ground black pepper.

name: Crunchy Asian Cole Slaw
directions: Mix first 5 ingredients.
Blend remaining ingredients, along with seasoning pack from noodles, well, till the sugar dissolves.
Mix dressing with salad.
Chill and serve.

name: My Version of Lipton's Dry Onion Soup Mix
directions: combine all ingredients.
Store in an airtight container.
5 tablespoons is equal to 1 (1.25 oz.) package of lipton's dry onion soup mix.
I combined two different recipes to get this one that dh really likes.

name: Shrimp Pesto Salad
directions: Mix the first six (onion, celery, shrimp, chives, pesto, mayonnaise) ingredients together in a small bowl.
Peel and halve the avocados. Carefully remove the seed.
Slice a thin layer off the bottom of each avocado so it will sit flat.
Using a medium scoop, fill the four avocado halves evenly with shrimp mixture.
Squeeze lime juice over each salad.
Top with chopped tomato.
Serve and enjoy!

name: Mbs Steak & Ale Marinade
directions: Combine all ingredients, add meat and marinate as long as you'd like!
This stuff makes GREAT Grilled Chicken!

name: Oriental Chicken Salad
directions: Combine first five ingredients in a large bowl.
Shake the rest of ingredients except chow mein noodles together.
Pour dressing over salad.
Serve with chow mein noodles.

name: Chili Cheese Dip
directions: Spread cream cheese into bottom of an 8x8 glass baking dish.
Remove the grease from the top of the chili.
Then spread the chilli over the cream cheese.
Sprinkle with grated cheese.
Microwave for 5-7 minutes on high till cheese is melted.
Serve with chips.

name: BBQ Steak Marinade
directions: Mix all ingredients and put with steak in plastic bag.
Let marinade for 1 hour to overnight.

name: Tequila Shrimp
directions: Combine all ingredients in a bowl
Let marinate for 30 minutes.
Cook till shrimp turns pink and curls inches
(Optional steps follow)
Add remaining marinade to pan and heat till boiling then add shrimp and combine for about 2 minutes.
Pour over pasta and eat as a tequila scampi.

name: Cucumbers With Easy Dressing
directions: In a bowl, combine mayonaisse, sugar, vinegar and salt by using a whisk (blend this well).
Add cucumbers and stir to coat.
Cover and refrigerate for 2 hours.

name: Mini Shrimp Cocktail Appetizers
directions: Spread each cracker with 1 tsp of the cream cheese spread.
Top evenly with the cocktail sauce and one shrimp.
Sprinkle some of the finely chopped onions on top (if you desire).

name: Tomato-Cheese Soup
directions: Put all ingredients into a pan, and heat slowly, stirring until all of the sour cream is incorporated and the cheese begins to melt. Do not boil.

name: Taco Dip
directions: Mix together taco seasoning, cream cheese and sour cream. Spread into a 9x13 inch pan.
Top with lettuce, tomatoes and cheese.
Serve with tortilla chips.

name: S.o.s Dip (A.k.a Dried Beef Dip)
directions: In a bowl, combine cream cheese and dried beef. Mix well.
Add mayonnaise and mix again.
You can refrigerate it for at least 15 minutes (better if longer).
**Note:  Do not add salt, the dried beef is very salty.

name: Noni's Special Marinade
directions: Mix all ingredients.
NOTE:  I have only used this on beef and lamb so far, but imagine it would be just as good for chicken.

name: Marinated Shrimp
directions: Layer shrimp, onion, lemon slices and olives in bowl.
Combine oil, vinegar, lemon juice, parsley, garlic, bay leaf, dry mustard, basil, salt and pepper in a jar with a tight-fitting lid.  Cover; shake to blend.
Pour marinade over shrimp; toss gently.  Cover; refrigerate overnight, tossing occasionally.
Serve chilled.

name: Crazy Paul's Chipotle Salsa
directions: Stir it all together.
Pack in jars or plastic containers. Refrigerate.
Store up to two weeks.

name: Pork Rub Ala Swinney
directions: Mix all dry ingredients. Rub on the outside of pork butt before smoking.
Multiply this recipe by four if you are smoking a half of hog.

name: Ginger Lime Tilapia
directions: Mix together the lime zest, ginger, paprika, garlic powder,  red pepper flakes, salt and pepper.
Sprinkle mixture on both sides of each tilapia filet.
Heat olive oil in a pan. Add the fish filets to the pan and cook on medium-high for 4 minutes on each side.
Sprinkle finished filets with lime juice.

similar.name: Lavender Marinade for Chicken or Fish

name: Tapenade Mayonnaise
directions: Mix all ingredients together and spread onto sandwich of your choice.

name: Grilled Steak Marinade
directions: Mix salad dressing and seasoning.  Apply to one side of steaks with pastry brush.  Place steak dressing side down on grill.  When nice and brown, apply dressing to up side of steak.  Turn steaks and continue grilling until done to your liking.

name: Warm Italian Shrimp Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta as directed on package.
Place shrimp in colander or strainer; rinse briefly with cold water.
Let stand in colander until pasta is cooked.
To drain pasta, pour over shrimp in colander.
Meanwhile, in large bowl, mix remaining ingredients.
Gently stir cooked pasta and shrimp into tomato mixture.
Serve immediately.

name: Family Shrimp Salad (Ww Core)
directions: Chop boiled eggs.
Add other ingredients and mix.

name: Simply Elegant Salad With Balsamic Raspberry Vinaigrette
directions: In a medium sized bowl mix the two vinegarettes and black pepper together, stir until well blended. Set aside.
In a large bowl toss lettuce, cuccumbers, onions, grapes, tomatoes and almonds.
Add to veggies the desired amount of dressing, cheese, and more almonds. Enjoy!

name: Rockin' Light Taco Salad 4 Ww Pts
directions: Prepare chili as directed.
Place lettuce in a big bowl.
Top with tomatoes, chili and cheese.,then add the olives and sour cream.
Finish off with the crushed tortilla chips.

name: Shrimp Dip
directions: Soften cream cheese.
Chop shrimp.
Mix all ingredients.
Serve with crackers or chips.

name: Beef Jerky Marinade
directions: Mix together. Marinade beef at least one hour before drying.

name: Don't Be a Dill Dip!
directions: Mix all ingredients together, well.
Let stand overnight.
Serve with raw vegetables and crackers!

name: Layer Salad (With Swiss)
directions: Thaw peas and allow to dry somewhat.  Chop lettuce.  Cut eggs into slices.
In small bowl, combine mayonnaise and salad dressing.  Mix well.
In pretty dish (clear is best), layer as follows:  half of lettuce, sliced eggs, thawed peas, sugar, salad dressing mixture, other half lettuce, swiss cheese.

name: Marinade
directions: Mix ingredients in bowl whisking in olive oil last -- very slowly. Marinate 24 hours.

name: Zesty Layered Tortilla Dip
directions: Combine everything except salsa in a blender or food processor and blend thoroughly.
Pour into a small bowl and top with salsa.

name: Chicky Rotel  Dip / 3  Ingredients
directions: Drain chicken.
Dump all ingredients in a sauce pan.
Heat and stir constantly on low setting.
Lumps will disappear while stirring.
Serve warm with tortilla chips and/or rye toasts.

name: Ranch Cobb Salad
directions: Mix all ingredients and enjoy!

name: Lamb Rub or Marinade
directions: Mix everything together in a small bowl.
Rub on roast or  chops.
After rubbing the rub on the meat, Refrigerate the meat until ready to cook.

similar.name: Lavender Marinade for Chicken or Fish

name: Five Alarm Shrimp
directions: Peel and devein your shrimp,.
coarsely chop scallions. Cut your bell pepper into not too thin strips. Chop your cilantro, mince your garlic and chop your chile pepper.
For the peppercorns you will need them crushed.
In a shallow bowl, combine the cornstarch and salt.
Add the shrimp, toss to coat.
Heat the oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the shrimp and cook for 1 1/2 minutes per side or just til pink.
Add the scallions, bell pepper, cilantro, garlic and chile pepper. Cook, stirring often for 1 minute.
Add the line juice, water sugar and peppercorns. Cook, stirring constantly, for about 1 minute more.

name: Thai Shrimp & Cabbage
directions: In small skillet, stir fry the cabbage in 1 tsp oil for 2 minutes or until tender.  Remove and keep warm.
In the same skillet, stir-fry onion & garlic in the remaining oil until tender.
Add the shrimp, water, & soy sauce; stir-fry for 2-3 minutes or until shrimp turn pink.
Stir in cilantro and pepper flakes.
Serve over cabbage.

name: Zesty Shrimp Dip
directions: In small bowl, combine all ingredients; mix well. Chill.
Serve with assorted fresh vegetables or potato chips.
Refrigerate leftovers.

name: Tomato and Feta Salad
directions: In a serving bowl, gently toss together all ingredients.  Serve immediately or chill, covered, until ready to serve.

name: Spicy Corn Dip
directions: combine butter and cream cheese in the microwave until smooth, stirring frequently.
add corn and jalepenos to the butter and cream cheese mixture and stir together.
transfer to a small crockpot to keep warm.
serve with tortilla chips.

name: Tomato and Blue Cheese Salsa
directions: Combine all the above ingredients in a medium bowl with a fork until ingredients are evenly coated with olive oil.
Use to top steak, baked potatoes, whatever!
Roquefort cheese is also a fine choice for this salsa.
Cooking time is the time it takes to toast the walnuts in the oven.  Very quick to put together.

name: BBQ Marinade for Steaks
directions: Combine all ingredients. Pour over meats to be marinated; marinate 2-8 hours.

name: Fantastic Chip Dip
directions: Mix all spice ingredients. Add to sour cream (and cream cheese if using), and mix well. Cover and refridgerate for at least 2 hours.
Stir to blend just before serving with chips.

name: Reuben Dip
directions: Combine and heat all ingredients, except for milk, in a small saucepan over low heat until hot.
Thin with milk if necessary.

name: Easy Chili Salad
directions: Heat chili in separate bowl and set aside.
Put spinach in large serving bowl with tortilla chips.
Place warm chili on top.
Put cheese on top of chili.
Add tomatoes and serve!

similar.name: Rockin' Light Taco Salad 4 Ww Pts

name: Thai Peanut Shrimp
directions: Add shrimp to Zip N Steam bag, cook on high for 5 minutes.
Cook ramen noodles, broken up, in a large skillet of boiling water.
Whisk light coconut milk and peanut butter with lime juice and crushed red pepper flakes.
Toss with drained noodles, cooked shrimp, cucumber, and green onions.

name: Steamed Shrimp With Soy-Ginger Sauce
directions: Mix tarragon, salt, celery seed and cayenne in small bowl.
Place shrimp in a Zip N Steam Bag. Sprinkle with seasonings.
Add beer to bag. Steam until shrimp are done, about 5 minutes. Serve with sauce for dipping.
Soy-Ginger Sauce.
In small bowl, combine oil, soy sauce, onion and ginger.

name: Cheese Topping for Fish, Chicken or Steak
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
Put on top of cooked fish or meat.
Broil 2-3 minutes.

name: Too-Easy Tortellini Soup
directions: In a large saucepan, bring broth to a boil.  Stir in tortellini.  Reduce heat; simmer, uncovered, for 4 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stir in the beans, tomatoes and basil.  Simmer for 4-6 minutes or until pasta is tender.  Stir in the vinegar. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and pepper if desired.

name: Sweet & Spicy Mustard Sauce
directions: Mix all dry ingredients together and put in a non-stick pot.
Beat eggs with vinegar in a small bowl.
Add egg/ vinegar mixture to the dry ingredients.
Bring to a boil stirring constantly.
When the sauce starts to boil, add the butter.
Continue to boil until thinkened.
store in an airtight jar in the fridge.
Keeps for 7 days.

name: Bagel Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Serve with pieces of bagels.
EASY!

name: Excellent Shrimp Dip
directions: blend all ingredients together except for the shrimp. I blend mine in my mixer for ease.
fold in shrimp.
chill for a least 1 hour.
serve with bugles, for the best taste, but any kind of chip would work.

name: Crock Pot Chicken and Wild Rice Soup
directions: DO NOT use quick cooking or instant rice.
Combine broth, chicken (cut into bite size pieces), water, celery, carrots, rice and enclosed seasoning packet, onion, pepper and parsley flakes in a 4 to 7 quart Crock Pot slow cooker; mix well.
Cover; cook on LOW for 6 to 7 hours, or on HIGH 4 to 5 hours, or until chicken is tender.
Stir in vinegar, if desired.

similar.name: My Version of Lipton's Dry Onion Soup Mix

name: Chef's Salad
directions: Combine first 6 ingredients.  Serve as is, or spoon mixture into pita bread halves.
Serve with dressing.  Serve immediately.

name: Cold Shrimp Dip
directions: Mix cream cheese and mayonnaise in food processor until smooth.
Process other ingredients.
Serve cold with chips or crackers.

name: The Best Veggie Dip Your Taste Buds Have Ever Tasted
directions: put everything in a bowl except scallions.
stir for about 2 minutes, untl everything is well mixed.
taste it because you will be so suprised.
spoon dip into your serving bowl.
garnish with scallions on top of dip.
place in fridge to cool until ready to serve.
serve with crackers( we use the townhouse flipside crackers).

name: Easy BLT Dip
directions: Place unwrapped package of cream cheese on microwaveable serving plate.
Microwave on High for 45 sec. to 1 min, or until warmed.
Top with remaining ingredients.

name: BLT Dip
ingredients: diced tomatoes with garlic and olive oil
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
Chill and serve with crackers or toasted bread slices cut into triangles.

name: Pesto Dip
directions: Place all ingredients in a food professor an dblend until smooth.
Chill before serving.

name: Creamy Fiesta Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients. Cover. Refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: So-Simple Salsa Dip
directions: In 1-quart saucepan, heat cream cheese and salsa over low heat about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until cream cheese is melted.
Keep warm in heatproof dish. Serve with chips.

name: Seasoned Salt or Seasoned Pepper
directions: Blend all ingredients thoroughly.
Store, tightly covered, at room temperature.
Keeps for two years.
Makes an excellent gift!

name: 7-Layer Dip
directions: In 2-quart shallow dish, combine Lipton® Recipe Secrets® Savory Herb with Garlic Soup Mix and sour cream.
Evenly layer remaining ingredients, except tortilla chips, ending with cheese. Chill, if desired. Serve with tortilla chips.
Tip: For a spicier dip, substitute 1/4 cup sliced and drained canned jalapeno peppers for the chopped green chilies.

name: Hidden Valley Seafood Dip
directions: Mix Dip mix with sour cream.
Add chopped shrimp (can sub cooked crab meat or minced canned clams).
Stir in water chestnuts and minced green onion.

name: Spinach Burst Dip
directions: Defrost spinach and drain.
Mince Garlic and roast untill golden and caramelly.
Dice up water chesnuts (chunky).
Dice up red bell pepper (chunky).
Add all remaining ingredients.
Chill for at least 4 hours (I chill overnight to set the spices, or it will taste a lot different).
Serve in a bread bowl or half of a gutted red bell pepper.

name: Sweet Thai Coleslaw
directions: Mix ingredients in a small bowl and stir until cole slaw is fully coated.

name: Liz's Easy Garlic Herb Butter
directions: Make sure that your butter is softened. NOT MELTED.
Put all of your ingredients in a mixing bowl and beat it until everything is mixed well and incorporated. Your butter will probably be a little creamy.
Scrape the bowl and put your garlic butter in a container that has a lid and close the lid completely to make sure that no outside air will come inches
Stick your dish in either the fridge or your freezer.
I like to make this butter a day in advance so all of the ingredients can hang out. You don't have to let it sit if you need to use it immediately.
NOTE  : Keep in mind that a little will go a long way.

name: Garlic Cucumber Dip
directions: Peel cucumber and grate, squeeze between paper towels several time to remove excess moisture.
Place cucumber in a small bowl; stir in yogurt, sour cream, oil, dill, vinegar, garlic and salt.
Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.  Sprinkle with additional minced dill.

name: Fresh & Fruity Spinach Salad
directions: In a large bowl, combine the spinach, nectarine, strawberries, kiwi and walnuts.
Place the first six vinaigrette ingredients in a blender; cover and process for 15 seconds.  While processing, gradually add oil in a steady stream.
Drizzle over salad and toss to coat.  Serve immediately.

name: Chinese Coleslaw (Family Version)
directions: In a large bowl, combine the coleslaw mix, green onions and sunflower seeds together.
In a Ziplock bag, mix the broken Ramen noodles and almonds together.
Prepare the dressing by mixing the oil, vinegar, sugar and beef flavoring in a shakeable container.
Serve by adding the noodle and almond combination to the coleslaw, green onion and sunflower mix. Pour the dressing over the mixture and mix well.

name: Garlic and Herb Shrimp
directions: On Medium heat, melt the butter in a medium sized shallow pan. Add the shrimp. Add the garlic and cook it for about 20-30 seconds. Add the other seasonings and herbs.
Cook the shrimp for about 2-3 minutes and they start to turn pink. Add the malt vinegar and lemon or lime juice and continue to cook for about 1-2 more minutes all the shrimp are a bright pink color.
Serve with melted butter or the remaining pan sauce.

name: Amazing 4 Ingredient Steak Marinade
directions: Mix the ingredients together.  Combine marinade with steaks (I usually combine with 2 16 oz. new yorks or t-bones, when they are on sale ofcourse).  Cooks.com says to marinate for 2-3 hours, I usually marinate overnight.

name: A Beautiful Salad
directions: Simply put all ingredients except the nuts, into a large salad bowl.
Toss with vinaigrette.
Serve and enjoy!
I do not add the nuts to the salad, but serve them separately at the table to avoid their becoming less then crisp.

similar.name: Simply Elegant Salad With Balsamic Raspberry Vinaigrette

name: Cayenne-And-Cumin Barbecue Rub for Ribs or Brisket
directions: Mix the dry ingredients.
Rub onto the meat before grilling over indirect heat.

name: Honey-Curry Vegetable Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Chill for at least one hour to allow flavors to meld.
Clean and cut fresh vegetables into serving pieces.
Serve vegetables with dip.
May also be spread on bread for tasty sandwiches or used with crackers.

name: That Pink Chip Dip
directions: Cream together cream cheese and mayonaise.  Add everything else but the milk and mix.  Add enough milt for a pleasing consistancy.
Serve with a hearty potato chip.

name: Fast and Easy Chip Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.  Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.  Great with chips, crackers, buffalo wings, etc.

name: Dannon Creamy Salsa Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
Cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.

name: Joanna's Party Dip
directions: Fry the bacon without any added fat in a small frying pan until slightly brown but not crisp. Trim any obvious fat and pat dry with absorbent paper towels.
Roughly chop the bacon and finely chop the tomato.
Add the cream cheese to a small blender or chopper and add the rest of the ingredients on top of it.
Blend well until the bacon pieces have become small and evenly dispersed throughout the mixture.
Scrape onto small plate or in bowl, cover with cling film and refrigerate for at least two hours.
Serve with crackers. Enjoy!

name: Tangerine Shrimp
directions: Make sure that all shrimp are peeled, deveined and defrosted. You can leave the tails on but I prefer them without tails.
in large skillet over medium heat saute garlic and onions in the butter until soft. Once onions are soft add in the juice of the 2 tangerines and let simmer for 2 minutes.
Add the shrimp into the sauted mixture and cook until done (about 5 or 6 minutes).

name: Sweet and Spicy Steak Marinade
directions: Mix all ingredients in a bowl until sugar is desolved.
Pour mixture in a ziploc bag and add meat.
Seal and let marinate for at least 30 minutes.

name: Easy 4 Layer Taco Dip
directions: Spread cream cheese on the bottom of a microwave safe dish.
Next spread the can of chili on top of the cream cheese.
Pour the salsa on top of the chili.
Put cheese on top of the salsa.
Microwave until the cheese is bubbly & melted.

name: Montreal Steak Marinade
directions: Mix well. Add 1 lb. steak; marinate 30 minutes (or overnight).  Grill.

name: Easy Tangy Tartar Sauce
directions: In a bowl, combine mayonnaise, relish, capers and pepper. Serve with fish.
Yes, it really is that easy! :).

name: Fresh Crisp Coleslaw
directions: Mix all ingredients;  Chill at least 1 hour.

name: Baja Sauce
directions: Blend mayonnaise, sour cream, avocado, and lime juice with a food processor or blender.
Stir in chopped cilantro and jalapeno.
Stir in salt and pepper.
Yum.

name: Cream of Anything Soup Mix
directions: Measure all dry ingredients and place in a Ziploc Bag.
Combine and place in a storage container.
To use combine 1/3 cup mix with 1 cup of water.
Add in any of the above optional ingredients.
Cook over low heat until thickened.

similar.name: My Version of Lipton's Dry Onion Soup Mix
Crock Pot Chicken and Wild Rice Soup

name: Curry Vegetable Dip
directions: Mix all the ingredients and chill for a few minutes before serving.

name: Clam Dip For A Party
directions: Place cream cheese in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, and mix for a few seconds.
Add sour cream and mix well, until no chunks remain. Scrape down sides and bottom of bowl and mix well again.
Add clam juice and Worcestershire sauce, and mix slowly to avoid splashing, until fully incorporating. Dip will be on the thin side.
Add salt and black pepper, and mix well.
Add clams and mix just to combine.
Store in a container and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving. Dip will thicken in refrigerator. Serve with ridged potato chips.

name: Chicken Rub!
directions: Mix it all together and store it in a zip lock bag or some other container.  You'll have plenty left over to use later.

name: Joe's Vegetable Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Put in freezer 15 to 20 minutes to thicken if you need to use it immediately.
Or, put in the fridge for several hours to thicken.

name: Easy Steak Marinade
directions: In a small mixing bowl, whisk together wet ingredients. Add dry ingredients and whisk to combine.

name: Dill Dip for Artichokes (Lowfat)
directions: Combine all ingredients well. (4 servings, 104 calories).

name: Easy Fat Free French Onion Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together, cover and chill for at least an hour or more before serving.

name: Raw Mayonnaise
directions: Blend until smooth.

name: Avocado Chicken Salad
directions: Combine the avocado, lime, mayonnaise, sour cream, worcestershire sauce, and season salt in a food processor and process until smooth. Transfer the dressing to a large bowl and fold in the chicken, celery, and dried cranberries until well-combined. Chill in the refrigerator at least 1 hour before serving.

name: Conway Dip
directions: Combine all ingredients and chill until ready to serve.

name: Dried Beef Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients together in bowl. Refrigerate for a couple of hours and serve with Onion Bagels.

name: Colleen's Marinade
directions: Mix together and use to marinate meat- 1-4 hours.

name: Super Simple Shrimp Tailgate Dip
directions: In a food processor, add shrimp and chop fine.
Add onion, cream cheese, mild cheddar and melted butter.  Blend well.
Place mixture in a bowl and refrigerate.
Serve with chips and/or assorted vegetables.

name: Avocado Salad Dressing
directions: Chop the cilantro and garlic. Combine the garlic and cilantro with all other ingredients in food processor.  Process until creamy.  refrigerate.

similar.name: Three Ingredient Salad Dressing to Die For

name: BLT Dip
directions: Just mix it all up, season lightly with salt & pepper, chill & serve.

name: One Yolk Mayonaise
directions: Combine egg yolk, lemon juice, vinegar, mustard, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in medium bowl. Whisk until blended and bright yellow, about 30 seconds.

Using 1/4 teaspoon measure and whisking constantly, add 1/4 cup oil to yolk mixture, a few drops at a time, about 4 minutes. Gradually add remaining 1/2 cup oil in very slow thin stream, whisking constantly, until mayonnaise is thick, about 8 minutes (mayonnaise will be lighter in color). Cover and chill. Keep chilled.

name: Veggie Dip for Veggie Platters
directions: Combine the ingredients, mixing well.  Transfer the dip to a smaller bowl (which can be your serving bowl); cover tightly with film and refrigerate.
Before serving, stir the dip in the bowl and garnish with a few shakes of paprika, chopped scallion, chopped tomato, etc.--something with lots of color!

Your eyes eat first:  spend some time on your vegetable prep.  Choose nice looking ones and cut them into bite-size, easy-to-handle pieces.  Usually, you can cut them the day before and store in food storage bags overnight, being sure to squeeze out as much air as you can.  It really helps!

similar.name: The Best Veggie Dip Your Taste Buds Have Ever Tasted

name: Hurryup Soup
directions: Shake chicken stock and pour into a 6-quart pot. Add chicken, herbs, seasonings and vegetables.
Bring to a boil. Add rice. Turn down heat and simmer about 10 minutes until vegetables are tender.

similar.name: Crock Pot Chicken and Wild Rice Soup
My Version of Lipton's Dry Onion Soup Mix

name: Sweet Cream Hot Mustard
directions: Combine wet ingredients and mix well.
Add dry ingredients and mix until fully incorporated.
Refrigerate and allow to sit overnight to fully meld flavors.
Keeps for months refrigerated.  Store refrigerated.

name: Spicy Mayo
directions: Mix all together.
Use as condiment on sandwiches.

name: Marinated Vegetables - Light Version
directions: Break or cut vegetables into bite sized pieces or florets.
Mix in a large, sealable Tupperware type container.
Dressing:
Mix and pour over vegetables.
Let stand overnight.
will keep two weeks in refrigerator.
Other vegetables you can add:
yellow squash or zucchini.
fresh mushrooms.
cucumbers.
red and/or yellow peppers.
(Note:  Radishes taste good in this recipe but the red color bleeds into the white radish and takes on an unappealing appearance after a fews days).
